response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, but the role demands a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Title progression caps at Senior/Staff Software Engineer, there is no evidence of principal-level technical leadership, no shipped AI products or platforms, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product direction at scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Active community contributor with open-source platform (GISCollective) and conference talks
concerns: No principal/director-level IC track record or recognized AI expertise
No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research credentials
Tenure and titles suggest ~13 years, short of the 15-year bar, with limited cloud-platform strategy scope

key_factors.factor: Lack of principal-level AI leadership and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC expectation
Recent MCP/agentic tooling work at re:cinq
